records.m_Talk_ENG: Krgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you remember all the C.O.s that attacked you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you remember all the C.O.s that attacked you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you remember all the C.O.s that attacked you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were the ones who failed to mutate and were simply discarded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were the ones who failed to mutate and were simply discarded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were the ones who failed to mutate and were simply discarded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They only sought one thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They only sought one thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They only sought one thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something they lacked. The perfected factor within you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something they lacked. The perfected factor within you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something they lacked. The perfected factor within you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then they better line up and pay for it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then they better line up and pay for it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then they better line up and pay for it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll crush every single one of them, one by one!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll crush every single one of them, one by one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll crush every single one of them, one by one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Junk food!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Junk food!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Junk food!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what the very first step in my research was?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know what the very first step in my research was?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what the very first step in my research was?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Figuring out the weaknesses of the afflicted like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Figuring out the weaknesses of the afflicted like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Figuring out the weaknesses of the afflicted like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Silver bullets, sunlight... I made sure to equip myself with all the necessary tools.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Silver bullets, sunlight... I made sure to equip myself with all the necessary tools.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Silver bullets, sunlight... I made sure to equip myself with all the necessary tools.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To study the one who caused the Aberrant Counterside Effect, of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To study the one who caused the Aberrant Counterside Effect, of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To study the one who caused the Aberrant Counterside Effect, of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's why I couldn't use my full strength... It wasn't just the Corruption rays...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that's why I couldn't use my full strength... It wasn't just the Corruption rays...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's why I couldn't use my full strength... It wasn't just the Corruption rays...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That explains why I struggled against those things...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That explains why I struggled against those things...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That explains why I struggled against those things...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Through countless failed experiments, I learned how sunlight affects them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Through countless failed experiments, I learned how sunlight affects them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Through countless failed experiments, I learned how sunlight affects them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sunlight is deadly to activated factors and mutated cells...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sunlight is deadly to activated factors and mutated cells...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sunlight is deadly to activated factors and mutated cells...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you set me up from the start to weaken me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you set me up from the start to weaken me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you set me up from the start to weaken me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just shut up. You're getting on my nerves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just shut up. You're getting on my nerves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just shut up. You're getting on my nerves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have no chance of winning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have no chance of winning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have no chance of winning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and the Pale Moon afflicted, accept your fate and cooperate with my research.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You and the Pale Moon afflicted, accept your fate and cooperate with my research.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You and the Pale Moon afflicted, accept your fate and cooperate with my research.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be painful. You'll be unconscious for most of the experiments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be painful. You'll be unconscious for most of the experiments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be painful. You'll be unconscious for most of the experiments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I pride myself on my professional ethics, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I pride myself on my professional ethics, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I pride myself on my professional ethics, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Spare me your nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Spare me your nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Spare me your nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you not fear the wrath of the Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you not fear the wrath of the Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you not fear the wrath of the Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Red Moon rose, people were consumed by madness, slaughtering each other in the streets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Red Moon rose, people were consumed by madness, slaughtering each other in the streets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Red Moon rose, people were consumed by madness, slaughtering each other in the streets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're truly a believer, answer me this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're truly a believer, answer me this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're truly a believer, answer me this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did your god do nothing that day?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did your god do nothing that day?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did your god do nothing that day?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't answer, can you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't answer, can you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't answer, can you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deep down, you resent Him too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deep down, you resent Him too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deep down, you resent Him too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, can't you use that weird book of yours to seal him or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, can't you use that weird book of yours to seal him or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, can't you use that weird book of yours to seal him or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'd love to, but no. It's impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'd love to, but no. It's impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'd love to, but no. It's impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't even fully understand... how this book works.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't even fully understand... how this book works.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't even fully understand... how this book works.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, useless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, useless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, useless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just saved you from becoming a lab rat, you know?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just saved you from becoming a lab rat, you know?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just saved you from becoming a lab rat, you know?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're nothing but a useless Junk food that tastes good!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're nothing but a useless Junk food that tastes good!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're nothing but a useless Junk food that tastes good!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we can't just sit here and do nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we can't just sit here and do nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we can't just sit here and do nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can make it out of the estate, we can call for backup from the Holy Curia, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can make it out of the estate, we can call for backup from the Holy Curia, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can make it out of the estate, we can call for backup from the Holy Curia, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-me? I can't guarantee it, but it's possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-me? I can't guarantee it, but it's possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-me? I can't guarantee it, but it's possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then take this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then take this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then take this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A radio?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A radio?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A radio?
